description: Toastabags | Air Fryer Liner Natural- 2 Pack Reusable and non-stick air fryer liner fits most circular baskets up to 5L and keeps your air fryer cleaner for longer. Holes in liner allows air to circulate for perfect air fryer cooking and can withstand temperatures up to 260 degrees Celsius.
